displayProperties.description:
[Super]  : Conjure a hail of deadly woven needles.

After embedding themselves in the environment, the needles will re-weave into a host of Threadlings.

Threadlings you create will return to you and perch if they can't find any nearby targets. Damaging targets with your weapons or melee will send out perched Threadlings to attack.

displayProperties.name: MIDA Synergy
displayProperties.description: Superb handling. Move faster with this weapon equipped. When MIDA Multi-Tool is equipped, this weapon grants additional speed benefits and final blows grant modification progress to MIDA Multi-Tool.

displayProperties.name: Survivalist Hunter Armor
displayProperties.description: Improved recovery.

displayProperties.name: Ferrous Ever-Present
displayProperties.description: Equip this tier 5 weapon ornament to change the appearance of The Ever-Present. Once you get an ornament, it's unlocked for all characters on your account.

displayProperties.name: Sureshot HCS
displayProperties.description:
Pinpoint Hand Cannon sight. 
  •  Increases range
  •  Decreases stability
  •  Decreases handling speed

displayProperties.name: Veteran Legend Cloak
displayProperties.description: Equip this ornament on any eligible Legendary armor item to change its appearance. Once you get a universal ornament, it's unlocked for all characters of the relevant class on your account.

displayProperties.name: Astral Stasis Drake Hunter Grips
displayProperties.description: Equip this ornament on any eligible Legendary armor item to change its appearance. Once you get a universal ornament, it's unlocked for all characters of the relevant class on your account.

displayProperties.name: Valkyrie's Descent Gloves
displayProperties.description: Equip this ornament on any eligible Legendary armor item to change its appearance. Once you get a universal ornament, it's unlocked for all characters of the relevant class on your account.

displayProperties.name: BRAVE Edge Transit
displayProperties.description: Equip this limited edition weapon ornament to change the appearance of Edge Transit.

displayProperties.name: Malevolent Grasp
displayProperties.description: While a Strand Super is equipped, casting Rift will suspend nearby combatants. Suspend deals damage over time, which heals you in the process. Targets who break free from suspension suffer additional damage. Defeating suspended targets heals you a moderate amount.

displayProperties.name: Eerie Thaumaturge Bond
displayProperties.description: Equip this ornament on any eligible Legendary armor item to change its appearance. Once you get a universal ornament, it's unlocked for all characters of the relevant class on your account.

displayProperties.name: Imperial Dress
displayProperties.description: Equip this shader to change the color of your gear.

displayProperties.name: Aggressive Glaive
displayProperties.description: Hard-hitting, slow melee/ranged polearm with a frontal shield. Generates shield energy on dealing ranged damage.

displayProperties.name: Painted Kitsune Robes
displayProperties.description: Equip this ornament on any eligible Legendary armor item to change its appearance. Once you get a universal ornament, it's unlocked for all characters of the relevant class on your account.

displayProperties.name: Ennead Projection
displayProperties.description: Equip this item to change your Ghost's projection.

displayProperties.name: Will of Light (Stasis)
displayProperties.description:
This mod's perks are only active in the "King's Fall" raid.

Multiple copies of this mod stack and improve its effects.

displayProperties.name: Precision Frame
displayProperties.description:
Fires a slower grenade projectile that bounces. 
[Shoot]  : Fire; release to detonate.

displayProperties.name: Gjallardoodles
displayProperties.description: Deliver these explosively delicious treats to Commander Zavala in the Tower Courtyard.

displayProperties.name: Vanishing Shadow
displayProperties.description: Increases the duration of any invisibility effects. When you gain invisibility, your grenade, melee and class abilities recharge faster. At maximum stacks, you gain a Void Overshield as well.

displayProperties.name: Mercury Glimmer Scavenger
displayProperties.description: Increase Glimmer gains by 10% on Mercury.

displayProperties.name: Eyes Up, Guardian
displayProperties.description: Collecting Orbs of Power strengthens this weapon's next several ricochet shots, providing more damage and more bounces between targets.
